themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Yet the LORD would not destroy Judah for David his servant's sake, as he promised him to give...". Word-study detail reinforces "אָֽמַר: sake as he promised - to say (used with great latitude)".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

themes.label: Suffering
themes.summary: This chapter deals with affliction, sorrow, trial, lament, endurance, or hardship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "וַיֵּ֖בְךְּ: wept - to weep; generally to bemoan".
